purpose: future compatible BAM or SAM alignment-mode consume coverage
generation_notes: The SAM and FASTA are the provenance root.
The CRAM is expected to require the explicit FASTA under strict reference policy.
The same CRAM should be used for both explicit-reference success and missing-reference failure scenarios.
review_notes: Review the SAM header against the FASTA reference dictionary first.
Treat regenerated BAM and CRAM artifacts as derived outputs whose drift may reflect toolchain changes.
